specifications: Must be a tri-merge or Residential Mortgage Credit Report (RMCR) from all 3 bureaus (Experian, TransUnion, Equifax)
Must include credit scores from all reporting bureaus
Must identify all borrowers on the loan
Must show all tradeline details including payment history, balances, and credit limits
Must show mortgage/housing payment history if applicable
Must show all inquiries within the past 120 days
Must include public record searches for each city borrower resided in last 2 years
Must show collections, charge-offs, and any derogatory items
Must identify any active disputes or fraud alerts
Must be dated within 120 days of closing
Must verify Social Security number
reasons_needed: Credit score is required to validate DSCR program eligibility (minimum score thresholds apply per program matrix)
Tradeline requirements must be verified: 3 tradelines for 12+ months OR 2 tradelines for 24+ months OR 24-month mortgage history
Credit report is needed to identify any credit events (BK/FC/SS/DIL) and verify seasoning requirements
Housing history must be reviewed to confirm 0x30x12 mortgage payment history if applicable
Inquiries and public records must be reviewed to identify potential undisclosed debts or credit issues
Required per NQMF guidelines for all borrowers on loan

documentation_requirements: Obtain a tri-merge Residential Mortgage Credit Report (RMCR) from all three credit bureaus.
Verify the report includes credit scores from Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion.
Confirm the report is dated within 120 days of the note date.
Document all open tradelines, payment history, public records, and inquiries.
reason_for_requirement: Credit report is required to determine representative credit score and verify creditworthiness per program guidelines.
Credit analysis supports evaluation of borrower's payment history and outstanding obligations.
review_notes: Representative credit score is the middle score when three scores are available, or the lower of two scores.
FICO 800 reported — verify credit score meets or exceeds program minimum requirements.

specifications: Must be valid, unexpired government-issued photo identification
Must show borrower's full legal name matching loan application
Must include photograph, date of birth, and expiration date
Acceptable forms: state driver's license, state ID card, U.S. passport, or permanent resident card

reasons_needed.reason: Borrower identity verification required for Emmanuel Nyarko before loan documents can be executed
Photo ID required to confirm borrower identity matches credit report, title documents, and loan application

documentation_requirements: Obtain a valid, unexpired government-issued photo identification for all borrowers.
Verify the identification is legible and includes the borrower's full legal name, photograph, and date of birth.
Confirm the name on identification matches the loan application and all supporting loan documents.
reason_for_requirement: Borrower identity verification is required per program guidelines and regulatory compliance standards.
Identity documentation supports anti-fraud and Know Your Customer (KYC) requirements.
review_notes: Acceptable forms include state-issued driver's license, state ID card, U.S. passport, or military ID.

specifications: Must be fully executed with borrower's wet or electronic signature
Must include correct borrower name, SSN, and current address
Must specify tax years to be requested (most recent 2 years)
Must include subject property address as listed on loan application

reasons_needed.reason: IRS Form 4506-C required per NQM guidelines for tax transcript authorization
Enables verification of income documentation against IRS records if required

documentation_requirements: Obtain a fully executed IRS Form 4506-C signed by all borrowers.
Verify the form is the current version accepted by the IRS and program guidelines.
Confirm all borrower names, Social Security numbers, and tax years are accurately completed.
Ensure the form authorizes transcript retrieval for the applicable tax years per program requirements.
reason_for_requirement: Tax transcript authorization is required for income verification and fraud prevention per NQM guidelines.
Form enables lender to obtain IRS transcripts to validate income documentation, if required.
review_notes: For DSCR loans, Form 4506-C may be required for file documentation even when tax transcripts are not used for qualification.

specifications: Must be fully executed with all parties' signatures
Must show purchase price of $210,000 consistent with loan application
Must identify subject property address in Tennessee
Must include all addenda, amendments, and seller concession details if applicable
Must show earnest money deposit amount and holder
Must include closing date and contingency deadlines

reasons_needed.reason: Purchase transaction requires executed purchase contract to establish sales price and terms
Contract required to verify LTV calculation based on lesser of purchase price or appraised value
Required to confirm subject property address and verify no undisclosed seller concessions

documentation_requirements: Obtain a fully executed purchase contract including all pages, addenda, and amendments.
Verify the contract includes buyer and seller names, subject property address, purchase price, and closing date.
Confirm earnest money deposit terms and any seller concessions or credits are clearly documented.
Ensure all parties have signed and dated the contract and any modifications.
reason_for_requirement: Purchase contract establishes the terms of the real estate transaction and purchase price for underwriting.
Contract is required to verify transaction details, parties involved, and any financing contingencies.
review_notes: Any amendments or addenda modifying contract terms must be provided.
Verify contract terms are consistent with loan application and closing disclosure.

document_requests.document_type: Borrower Certification as to Business Purpose
reasons_needed: NQM guidelines require a signed Borrower Certification of Business Purpose disclosing the purpose for Business Purpose loans
Investor DSCR program is a business purpose product requiring borrower certification
Investment property occupancy designation must be supported by business purpose declaration
Required for compliance with TILA/Reg Z business purpose exemption documentation
Confirms property will not be used as borrower's residence, consistent with DSCR program requirements that 'Property cannot be occupied by the borrower(s)'
Business purpose must be documented to establish loan is not subject to consumer protection regulations

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must identify borrower Emmanuel Nyarko by full legal name
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must identify subject property address in Tennessee
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must clearly state the business/investment purpose of the transaction
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must affirm property is for investment purposes and NOT owner-occupied
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must be signed and dated by borrower
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must confirm borrower does not intend to occupy the property as primary or secondary residence
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must be consistent with the Investor DSCR loan program requirements
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must reconcile with occupancy type (Investment) indicated on loan application
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

satisfied_specifications.specification: Signature date must be within 120 days of closing
satisfied_specifications.reason: Equivalent document 'Borrowers Authorization' present in manifest

display.document_heading: Borrower Certification as to Business Purpose
documentation_requirements: Obtain a signed Business Purpose Affidavit from all borrowers on the loan.
Verify the certification confirms the loan is for business or investment purposes, not consumer or personal use.
Confirm the affidavit is dated and properly executed per program requirements.
reason_for_requirement: Business purpose certification is required for NQM/DSCR loans to document non-consumer purpose exemption.
Affidavit supports determination that loan is exempt from certain consumer protection regulations.
review_notes: Investment property loans require affirmative borrower certification that the loan purpose is business or investment related.

specifications: Must cover most recent 12 months of payment history for all existing mortgages
Must identify borrower name and property address for each mortgage
Must show payment due dates and actual payment dates
Must clearly indicate any late payments (30/60/90/120+ days)
Must show current loan balance and payment status
Must be from mortgage servicer or reflected on credit report
Payment history must demonstrate 0x30x12 (no 30-day lates in past 12 months) for best pricing
If not on credit report, separate VOM may be required
reasons_needed: Housing history verification required for all NQMF programs
12-month mortgage history with 0x30 required to satisfy housing history requirements
Late mortgage payments may affect eligibility or require additional seasoning
Mortgage payment history can satisfy tradeline requirements (24-month history with 0x30x12)
Required to identify any housing events (modifications, forbearances, 120-day lates)

documentation_requirements: Obtain verification of mortgage history for all real estate owned by the borrower.
Verify payment history reflects no late payments exceeding 30 days in the most recent 12 months.
Confirm current balance, monthly payment, and account status for each mortgage obligation.
reason_for_requirement: Mortgage payment history verification is required to assess borrower's housing payment track record.
Verification supports creditworthiness analysis for investment property financing.
review_notes: VOM or credit supplement may be required if mortgage tradelines are not fully reporting on the credit report.

specifications: Must be FNMA Form 1007 (Single-Family Comparable Rent Schedule)
Must identify the subject property address
Must show appraiser's opinion of market rent
Must include comparable rental data supporting the market rent estimate
Must be prepared by the appraiser as part of the appraisal report
If property is tenant-occupied at closing, the 1007 must reflect the terms of the current lease
reasons_needed: DSCR ratio calculation requires gross market rents from Form 1007 per NQM guidelines
For purchase transactions, gross market rents from the 1007 are used when property is vacant
Form 1007 is required for long-term rental DSCR loans to establish qualifying rental income

documentation_requirements: Obtain a completed DSCR Calculation Worksheet documenting the debt service coverage ratio analysis.
Verify the calculation includes gross rental income, PITIA (principal, interest, taxes, insurance, and association dues), and resulting DSCR ratio.
Confirm all input figures are supported by documentation in the loan file.
reason_for_requirement: DSCR calculation is the primary qualification metric for Investor DSCR loan programs.
Documented DSCR ratio must meet minimum program thresholds for loan approval.
review_notes: DSCR must meet or exceed the minimum ratio required by the selected Investor DSCR or DSCR Supreme program tier.

specifications: Must provide rent loss insurance coverage for the subject property
Coverage must equal at least 6 months of PITIA
Blanket policies covering the subject property are eligible
Must be in effect at time of closing
Policy must name subject property address
Must protect against fire, windstorm, hail, smoke, explosion, aircraft, vehicle, riot/civil commotion
Coverage must be on replacement cost basis (actual cash value not acceptable)
Must name all borrowers/persons holding title as named insured
Must include property address matching note and security instrument
Must include standard mortgagee clause (not loss payable clause)
Must include NQM Funding, LLC as mortgagee/loss payee
Must be effective at least 60 days after funding date
Must include policy number, premium amount, coverage amount, and deductible
Must require insurer to notify mortgagee in writing before cancellation
Evidence may be policy, Certificate of Insurance (COI), or insurance binder
Must cover subject investment property
Coverage must equal at least 6 months of PITIA (Principal, Interest, Taxes, Insurance, Association dues)
Must name borrower as insured party
Must include property address matching loan documents
Blanket policies covering subject property are eligible
Must be effective through closing and loan term
reasons_needed: Rent Loss Insurance for subject property is required per NQM DSCR guidelines
Coverage must equal at least 6 months of PITIA per guideline requirements
Protects lender interest in rental income stream
Hazard insurance is required for all mortgage transactions to protect collateral
Investment property must have adequate coverage for fire and extended perils
Replacement cost coverage required per NQMF guidelines
Rent Loss Insurance is required for all DSCR loans per NQMF guidelines
Protects rental income stream that supports DSCR qualification
Minimum 6 months PITIA coverage required per program matrix

documentation_requirements: Obtain evidence of hazard insurance for the subject property with coverage effective at closing.
Verify coverage amount meets the greater of the loan amount or replacement cost, as required.
Confirm the mortgagee clause names the lender and includes proper ISAOA/ATIMA language.
Document policy number, premium amount, effective dates, and insurance carrier information.
reason_for_requirement: Hazard insurance is required to protect collateral against loss or damage.
Adequate coverage protects lender's security interest in the property.
review_notes: If subject property is in a higher-risk area, additional coverage such as wind/hail may be required.
Verify no lapse in coverage if policy is being transferred or renewed.

specifications: Must show financial institution name and logo
Must show beginning and ending balances for each month
Must show complete transaction history
Must be dated within 90 days of note date per NQM guidelines
Must show sufficient funds for 20% down payment, closing costs, prepaid items, and reserves
Must show liquid assets remaining after funds to close
Reserves must be in acceptable asset types (checking, savings, money market)
Gift funds may NOT be used to meet reserve requirements per NQM guidelines
reasons_needed: Verify sufficient funds for down payment (20% of $210,000 purchase = $42,000)
Verify sufficient funds for closing costs and prepaid items
Verify sufficient reserves as required by DSCR program
Confirm account ownership matches borrower
Identify any large deposits requiring sourcing
Assets must be dated within 90 days of note date per NQM guidelines
DSCR Investment Property loans require reserve verification
Reserves must cover required months of PITIA based on program guidelines
Reserves provide risk mitigation for investment property loans
Must verify assets are acceptable type and owned by borrower

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must cover most recent 2 consecutive months
satisfied_specifications.reason: 5 Bank Statement documents found in manifest with account holder information

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must include all pages including blank pages
satisfied_specifications.reason: Bank statements in manifest contain statement period dates (statementPeriodFrom/statementPeriodTo)

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must show borrower name as account holder
satisfied_specifications.reason: Bank statements include account balance and transaction data in extracted_fields

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must show account number (full or last 4 digits acceptable)
satisfied_specifications.reason: Manifest document contains 'accounts' confirming this requirement

satisfied_specifications.specification: All accounts being used for funds to close must be included
satisfied_specifications.reason: Manifest document contains 'accounts' confirming this requirement

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must verify sufficient months of PITIA in reserves per program matrix
satisfied_specifications.reason: Manifest document contains 'statementPeriodFrom' confirming this requirement

satisfied_specifications.specification: Account statements used for reserve verification must be dated within 90 days of note date
satisfied_specifications.reason: Manifest document contains 'accounts' confirming this requirement

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must show account ownership matching borrower name
satisfied_specifications.reason: Manifest document contains 'accounts' confirming this requirement

documentation_requirements: Obtain the two most recent consecutive months of personal bank statements for all accounts used for funds to close.
Verify statements include account holder name, account number, financial institution name, statement period, and ending balance.
Confirm all pages of each statement are provided, including any transaction detail pages.
Document sufficient funds to cover down payment, closing costs, prepaid items, and required reserves.
reason_for_requirement: Asset verification is required to confirm borrower has sufficient funds for the transaction.
Bank statements support verification of down payment source and reserve requirements per program guidelines.
review_notes: Large deposits exceeding 50% of qualifying income must be sourced and documented.
Statements must be dated within 45 days of closing, or obtain updated statements.

specifications: Must show copy of cancelled check or wire confirmation for EMD
Must show deposit amount matching purchase contract EMD
Must show funds sourced from verified borrower account
Must include receipt from escrow/title company if available
If sourced from bank account, bank statement must show corresponding withdrawal
reasons_needed: Purchase transaction requires verification of earnest money deposit
EMD must be traced to acceptable source (borrower's verified funds)
Confirms borrower's financial commitment to the transaction
Required credit toward funds to close calculation

documentation_requirements: Obtain Verification of Deposit (VOD) directly from the financial institution, if required.
Verify current balance, average balance, and account opening date.
Confirm account holder name matches borrower name on loan application.
reason_for_requirement: VOD provides third-party verification of asset account balances and history.
Verification supports asset documentation when bank statements are insufficient or require supplementation.
review_notes: VOD may be required when bank statement documentation requires additional verification or clarification.

specifications: Must include all pages, addenda, and appraiser certification
Must include street map showing subject property and all comparables used
Must include exterior building sketch with dimensions and floor plan with GLA calculation
Must include original color photographs of front, street, rear views, and interior (kitchen, bathrooms, main living area)
Must include Sales Comparison Approach with minimum 3 comparable sales
Must confirm property condition is C1-C4 (C5/C6 not acceptable per NQMF guidelines)
Must confirm no structural deferred maintenance, health/safety issues, or fair/poor ratings
Must represent highest and best use with year-round accessibility
Must contain minimum 400 square feet with full kitchen and bathroom
Must disclose any adverse conditions, environmental hazards, or repair requirements
Must include appraiser license/certification and E&O insurance documentation
Must reconcile borrower/owner information with loan file
reasons_needed: Collateral valuation is required for all DSCR loan underwriting
LTV eligibility at 80% depends on confirmed appraised value
Property type and condition affect Investor DSCR program eligibility
Subject property identity must be consistent across all loan documentation
NQMF guidelines require C1-C4 condition for DSCR properties
Investment properties must meet minimum property standards per guidelines

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must be Uniform Residential Appraisal Form (FNMA Form 1004) for single-family residence
satisfied_specifications.reason: Appraisal Report document exists in manifest with property valuation data

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must identify subject property address matching all loan documents
satisfied_specifications.reason: Manifest contains appraisal document with property details and value fields

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must identify property type as Single-Family Residence and confirm unit count
satisfied_specifications.reason: Appraisal document in manifest includes property address and appraised value

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must show appraised value to support LTV/CLTV calculation at 80% LTV
satisfied_specifications.reason: Manifest document contains 'value' confirming this requirement

satisfied_specifications.specification: Must be dated within 120 days of Note date (or 365 days with recertification)
satisfied_specifications.reason: Manifest document contains 'appraisalDate' confirming this requirement

documentation_requirements: Obtain a complete appraisal report (Form 1004 or equivalent) for the subject property, including all pages, exhibits, addenda, photographs, and appraiser certifications.
Verify the appraised value supports the loan amount, LTV/CLTV ratios, and selected program parameters.
Confirm the subject property address, legal description, and property characteristics are consistent with the loan application, title, and collateral documentation.
Document that the appraisal was completed by a state-licensed or certified appraiser with no prohibited relationships.
Ensure the appraisal is dated within program-allowable age requirements relative to the note date.
reason_for_requirement: Collateral valuation is required to support program eligibility and loan-to-value analysis.
Appraisal establishes market value, property condition, and marketability for underwriting purposes.
Subject property identity and characteristics must be verified across all loan file documentation.
review_notes: If the appraisal reflects value subject to repairs or conditions, obtain evidence of completion prior to closing, if required.
Review for any adverse conditions, declining market notations, or factors affecting value or marketability.

specifications: Must provide Fannie Mae SSR (Submission Summary Report) with score
SSR score must be 2.5 or less to satisfy appraisal review process
Must identify subject property address matching appraisal
Must include UCDP submission confirmation
If SSR score exceeds 2.5, alternative review product required (CDA, AVM, or Field Review)
reasons_needed: NQMF appraisal review process requires secondary appraisal product to support value
SSR score of 2.5 or less satisfies standard appraisal review requirements
Validates appraisal data quality and value reasonableness

documentation_requirements: Obtain the Uniform Collateral Data Portal Submission Summary Report (UCDP SSR) for the subject property appraisal.
Verify the SSR reflects successful submission with no fatal errors or unresolved warnings.
Confirm the appraisal data in the SSR matches the appraisal report in the loan file.
Document the UCDP submission status and Doc File ID.
reason_for_requirement: UCDP submission is required for collateral data validation and compliance per secondary market requirements.
SSR documents successful appraisal submission to the portal and identifies any data quality issues.
review_notes: Review any warning messages and ensure they have been addressed or do not affect appraisal validity.
If applicable, ensure appraisal was also submitted to required portals per investor guidelines.

specifications: Must be a Flood Certificate from FEMA-certified provider
Must identify subject property address
Must clearly indicate flood zone designation (Section B4)
Must indicate whether property is in Special Flood Hazard Area (SFHA - Zone A or V)
Must indicate NFIP map availability (Section B5)
Must include determination date and certification
If in SFHA, community must participate in FEMA NFIP program
reasons_needed: Flood zone determination is required for all mortgage transactions
Determines whether flood insurance is required
Properties in Zone A or V require flood insurance per NQMF guidelines
Must align with appraisal report flood zone notation

documentation_requirements: Obtain a Standard Flood Hazard Determination (SFHD) for the subject property.
Verify the determination identifies the flood zone, FEMA map panel number, and effective map date.
Confirm the property address on the determination matches the subject property.
reason_for_requirement: Flood hazard determination is required to identify if the property is in a Special Flood Hazard Area (SFHA).
Determination supports flood insurance requirements and regulatory compliance.
review_notes: If property is located in a Special Flood Hazard Area (Zones A or V), obtain evidence of flood insurance meeting program requirements.

specifications: Must be FNMA Form 3170 (1-4 Family Rider / Assignment of Rents)
Must identify subject investment property address
Must be executed by all borrowers holding title
Must assign rental income rights to lender as additional collateral security
Must be recorded with security instrument
reasons_needed: Required for all investment properties per NQMF appraisal requirements
Provides lender with assignment of rents as additional security
Standard requirement for DSCR loans secured by rental property

documentation_requirements: Obtain the executed Deed of Trust or Mortgage securing the loan, prepared for recording.
Verify the legal description, property address, and borrower names are accurate and consistent with title and loan documents.
Confirm the document includes all required riders, covenants, and provisions per program guidelines.
reason_for_requirement: Deed of Trust establishes the security instrument creating the lien on the subject property.
Proper execution and recording is required to perfect the lender's security interest.
review_notes: Ensure the security instrument form is appropriate for the state where the property is located (Tennessee).

specifications: Must be issued by title insurer qualified to do business in Tennessee
Must conform to Fannie Mae/Freddie Mac requirements per NQMF guidelines
Must be written on 2006 ALTA standard form, ALTA short form, or state-approved ALTA form
Must contain 24-month title history showing all transfers with dates, prices, and buyer/seller names
Must identify borrower Emmanuel Nyarko as proposed insured
Must identify subject property address and complete legal description
Must disclose all liens, judgments, easements, encumbrances, and title exceptions
Must confirm first lien position for proposed $168,000 mortgage
Must show title insurer name and effective date
Must be dated within acceptable recency window (typically 30-90 days of closing)
Vesting history must be reviewed for inconsistencies or flipping activity
All title exceptions must be reviewed against NQMF allowable exceptions list
reasons_needed: Title must confirm clear and insurable ownership interest in subject property
Lien position verification required - must ensure proposed mortgage is in first lien position
24-month chain of title required per NQMF guidelines to identify any transfer irregularities
Title exceptions must be reviewed for impact on collateral value and marketability
Adverse credit that will impact title must be paid in full per guidelines
Required for underwriter to approve loan with acceptable title conditions

documentation_requirements: Obtain a title commitment from an approved title insurance company.
Verify the commitment identifies the proposed insured, property address, legal description, and proposed coverage amount.
Document all Schedule B-I requirements that must be satisfied prior to closing.
Review Schedule B-II exceptions and confirm acceptable title condition.
Confirm vesting will be in the name of the borrower(s) on the loan application.
reason_for_requirement: Title commitment is required to verify marketable title and identify any liens, encumbrances, or exceptions.
Title review ensures lender's lien position will be properly secured.
review_notes: All Schedule B-I requirements must be satisfied prior to or at closing.
Review any exceptions for potential impact on property value or lender's security interest.

specifications: Must be recorded deed conveying title to seller/current owner
Must show legal description matching title commitment and appraisal
Must identify all current vested owners of record
Must show manner of vesting (e.g., sole ownership, joint tenancy, tenants in common)
Must include recording information (book, page, instrument number, recording date)
Must reconcile with title commitment vesting schedule
If recent transfer within 24 months, must show purchase price and arms-length transaction
reasons_needed: Confirms seller has legal authority to convey property to borrower
Vesting must be verified to ensure clean title transfer at closing
Final title policy vesting must reflect borrower name per NQMF guidelines
Required to verify chain of title continuity and ownership rights
Legal description must match across all loan documents for enforceable lien

documentation_requirements: Obtain the executed Grant Deed or equivalent conveyance document transferring title to the borrower.
Verify the grantee name matches the borrower(s) on the loan application.
Confirm the legal description matches title commitment and appraisal.
Document that the deed is prepared for recording upon closing.
reason_for_requirement: Grant Deed conveys ownership from seller to borrower in the purchase transaction.
Proper vesting documentation is required to confirm borrower's ownership interest.
review_notes: Vesting must be consistent with loan application and program requirements for title holding.

specifications: Must be signed and dated by borrower Emmanuel Nyarko
Must certify property will be held as investment/rental property
Must confirm borrower does not intend to occupy property as primary or secondary residence
Must acknowledge investment property guidelines and requirements apply

reasons_needed.reason: Investment property occupancy must be certified for DSCR loan program eligibility
Occupancy type drives LTV limits, reserve requirements, and DSCR qualification methodology

documentation_requirements: Obtain a signed occupancy certification from all borrowers confirming the property will be held as an investment property.
Verify the certification accurately reflects the non-owner-occupied status of the subject property.
Confirm the certification is dated and properly executed.
reason_for_requirement: Occupancy certification is required to document the property use and confirm investment property status.
Certification supports program eligibility determination for Investor DSCR loan products.
review_notes: Investment property occupancy must be consistent across loan application, certifications, and supporting documentation.

specifications: Must be fully executed lease agreement if property is tenant-occupied at closing
Must identify the subject property address
Must show tenant name(s) and lease term
Must show monthly rent amount
Must have no less than 1 month remaining at time of closing if tenant-occupied
Month-to-month tenancy requires evidence to support continuance (signed extension letter, bank statements showing deposits, or 1007 confirming month-to-month)
Single room occupancy or boarder leases are not permitted
reasons_needed: If property is tenant-occupied at purchase, executed lease is required per NQM DSCR guidelines
Lease terms must be reflected on the 1007/1025 for tenant-occupied properties
Lease agreement verifies rental income amount and tenant occupancy status

documentation_requirements: Obtain a fully executed lease agreement for the subject property, if currently leased or rental income is being used.
Verify the lease includes tenant name(s), monthly rent amount, lease term, and signatures of all parties.
Confirm the lease commencement date, expiration date, and any renewal terms.
reason_for_requirement: Lease agreement documents actual or anticipated rental income for DSCR calculation.
Executed lease supports rental income stability and property cash flow analysis.
review_notes: If the property is vacant or will be tenant-occupied after closing, provide documentation of anticipated lease terms or use Form 1007 market rent.
If applicable, obtain evidence of security deposit and first month's rent collection.

specifications: Must be standard NFIP policy or equivalent private insurer policy
Coverage must be lower of: 100% replacement cost, $250,000 NFIP maximum, or unpaid principal balance
Must name all borrowers/title holders as named insured
Must include property address matching loan documents
Must include standard mortgagee clause (loss payable clause not acceptable)
Must include policy effective date covering closing and at least 60 days beyond funding
Must include policy number, premium amount, deductible, and coverage amount
Must require insurer to notify mortgagee before cancellation
reasons_needed: Flood insurance required if subject property is in SFHA Zone A or V
Protects collateral from flood damage per NQMF and federal requirements
Must be in place prior to closing if property is in flood zone

documentation_requirements: Obtain a Flood Certification (Life of Loan) for the subject property from an approved flood determination provider.
Verify the certification reflects the current FEMA flood zone status and map information.
Confirm the property address and legal description match the loan file documentation.
reason_for_requirement: Life of Loan Flood Certification provides ongoing flood zone monitoring throughout the loan term.
Certification is required to ensure continuous compliance with flood insurance requirements.
review_notes: If flood zone status changes during the loan term, flood insurance requirements may be affected.
Coordinate with Flood Hazard Determination for consistent flood zone information.
